description.en: Buy shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Purchase 'Yes' or 'No' shares for a specific market outcome using the CLOB API.
description.de: Kaufe Anteile in einem Prognosemarkt auf Polymarket. Kaufe 'Ja'- oder 'Nein'-Anteile für ein bestimmtes Marktergebnis über die CLOB-API.
description.es: Buy shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Purchase 'Yes' or 'No' shares for a specific market outcome using the CLOB API.
description.fr: Buy shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Purchase 'Yes' or 'No' shares for a specific market outcome using the CLOB API.
description.ro: Buy shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Purchase 'Yes' or 'No' shares for a specific market outcome using the CLOB API.
description.it: Buy shares in a prediction market on Polymarket. Purchase 'Yes' or 'No' shares for a specific market outcome using the CLOB API.

vars.API_KEY: env:POLYMARKET_API_KEY|Get your API key from Polymarket at https://polymarket.com/settings/api

description.en: The ID of the market to buy shares from.
description.de: Die ID des Marktes, von dem Anteile gekauft werden sollen.
description.es: The ID of the market to buy shares from.
description.fr: The ID of the market to buy shares from.
description.ro: The ID of the market to buy shares from.
description.it: The ID of the market to buy shares from.

description.en: Which outcome to buy shares for ('YES' or 'NO').
description.de: Für welches Ergebnis Anteile gekauft werden sollen ('YES' oder 'NO').
description.es: Which outcome to buy shares for ('YES' or 'NO').
description.fr: Which outcome to buy shares for ('YES' or 'NO').
description.ro: Which outcome to buy shares for ('YES' or 'NO').
description.it: Which outcome to buy shares for ('YES' or 'NO').

description.en: Amount of USDC to spend on shares.
description.de: Betrag an USDC, der für Anteile ausgegeben wird.
description.es: Amount of USDC to spend on shares.
description.fr: Amount of USDC to spend on shares.
description.ro: Amount of USDC to spend on shares.
description.it: Amount of USDC to spend on shares.
